content:
Refer to Prerequisites Ingress and AppGw sync failure#Prerequisitesfor stampname

Click Save.

Grant Ingress Controller's Managed Identity access for Application Gateway resource (e.g., Contributor role).

Rollout the ingress pod

kubectl rollout restart deploy ingress-azure -n default



Check Namespace is watched by Application Gateway ingress controller 

kubectl get configmap ingress-azure -n default -o yaml

Refer to Prerequisites for ‘Namespace’

Verify the namespace exist in KUBERNETES_WATCHNAMESPACE. More details https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/application-gateway/ingress-controller-multiple-namespace-support#enable-multiple-namespace-support .

If Namespace does not exist proceed with next step

Add Namespace 

kubectl edit configmap ingress-azure -n default

Add the namespace to the KUBERNETES_WATCHNAMESPACE list (comma-separated). Example:
KUBERNETES_WATCHNAMESPACE: default,my-app-namespace

Save and close the editor.

Rollout the ingress pod
